title: Complete error recovery C-port
description: Individual fixes (split-before-recoverToState, Push nodeCountAtLastError reset, RecordSummary depth, ERROR extra=true, trailing extras in recoverToState) match C semantics individually but cause 22 regressions combined. Go has other divergences (in-place Pop, version ordering, no merge-after-push) that C relies on. Needs coordinated effort. Potential: 4 wcu.21 + 5 Cat-G tests.
